data.title: Codrus Minerals Releases Interim Financial Report for H2 2024
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Codrus Minerals Ltd ( (AU:CDR) ).

Codrus Minerals Ltd has released its interim financial report for the half-year ending 31 December 2024. The report includes various sections such as the Directors’ Report, Auditor’s Independence Declaration, and the Independent Auditor’s Report. This release provides stakeholders with insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance over the past six months, which is crucial for assessing its market positioning and future prospects.

More about Codrus Minerals Ltd

Codrus Minerals Ltd is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on mineral exploration and development. The company is based in West Perth, Western Australia, and is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange under the ticker ASX: CDR.

data.title: Nordic Halibut Expands Production Capabilities with Strategic Partnership
data.description:
An update from Nordic Halibut AS ( (DE:9K1) ) is now available.

Nordic Halibut AS has entered into an agreement with Pure Norwegian Seafood AS to use its processing facilities, with an option to purchase all shares in PNS. This collaboration is pivotal for Nordic Halibut’s production scale-up plans, aiming for 10,350 tonnes HOG by 2031. The partnership enhances their production capabilities, secures local jobs, and strengthens their market position by achieving full control over the value chain, from genetics to processing.

More about Nordic Halibut AS

Nordic Halibut AS is a leading farmer of Atlantic halibut based in Western Norway, with headquarters in Averøy, Nordmøre. The company boasts a fully integrated value chain from genetics to sales and has achieved significant breakthroughs in early phase production. It aims to expand production volumes to 4,500 tonnes HOG by 2027 and 10,350 tonnes HOG by 2031, focusing on value accretive organic growth.

YTD Price Performance: -10.0%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €89.47M

data.title: Coca-Cola Europacific Partners Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Coca-Cola Europacific Partners ( (CCEP) ).

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners announced the repurchase of 53,181 ordinary shares as part of its share buyback program, aiming to repurchase up to EUR 1 billion of shares in total. This move is expected to enhance shareholder value and reflects the company’s strategic financial management, potentially impacting its market positioning positively.

More about Coca-Cola Europacific Partners

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners is a leading global consumer goods company that produces, distributes, and sells popular beverage brands. The company serves nearly 600 million consumers and supports over 4 million customers across 31 countries, leveraging its multinational scale and local expertise.

data.title: Uluru Co., Ltd. Reports Increased Sales but Declining Profits in Q3 FY2025
data.description:
Uluru Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3979) ) has shared an update.

Uluru Co., Ltd. reported a 15.7% increase in net sales for the first nine months of the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025, compared to the same period last year. However, the company experienced significant declines in EBITDA, operating profit, ordinary profit, and profit attributable to owners of the parent, with decreases of 41.0%, 51.1%, 47.9%, and 48.7% respectively. The financial results indicate a challenging period for Uluru, with implications for its profitability and stakeholder interests. Despite the increase in net sales, the company’s financial health appears to be under pressure, as reflected by the reduced profits and comprehensive income.

More about Uluru Co., Ltd.

Uluru Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating in an industry that involves providing various products and services. The company’s market focus and specific industry are not detailed in the provided text.

data.title: Reckitt Benckiser Executes Share Buyback Strategy
data.description:
Reckitt ( (GB:RKT) ) has shared an update.

Reckitt Benckiser Group PLC has repurchased 75,000 of its ordinary shares from HSBC Bank plc, as per the authority granted by shareholders in May 2024. This transaction, part of a strategic move to manage its share capital, results in the company holding a total of 52,928,453 shares in treasury, impacting the voting rights and shareholding structure.

More about Reckitt

Reckitt Benckiser Group PLC operates in the consumer goods industry, focusing on health, hygiene, and home products. The company is known for its diverse range of products that cater to various consumer needs, with a strong market presence globally.

data.title: Hill & Smith PLC Reports Strong 2024 Financial Results and Strategic Updates
data.description:
Hill & Smith Holdings ( (GB:HILS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hill & Smith PLC reported strong financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024, with profits surpassing market expectations. The company achieved a 5% increase in revenue on a constant currency basis and a 20% rise in underlying operating profit. The US operations significantly contributed to these results, accounting for 76% of the Group’s underlying operating profit, driven by robust demand for infrastructure solutions. The company also completed four US acquisitions and divested two non-core businesses, enhancing its portfolio. With a new CEO at the helm, Hill & Smith has updated its strategic framework, focusing on priority end markets and setting higher financial targets, positioning itself for continued growth in 2025 and beyond.

More about Hill & Smith Holdings

Hill & Smith PLC is a leading provider of solutions that enhance the resilience of vital infrastructure and the built environment. The company operates through autonomous, agile, customer-focused businesses primarily based in the UK, USA, and India, and is quoted on the London Stock Exchange.

YTD Price Performance: -7.17%

data.title: BW Group Increases Stake in Hafnia Limited
data.description:
Hafnia ( (HAFN) ) has provided an announcement.

BW Group Limited, the largest shareholder of Hafnia Limited, has significantly increased its stake in the company by purchasing a substantial number of shares on both the Oslo Børs and the New York Stock Exchange. This move underscores BW Group’s confidence in Hafnia’s market position and future prospects, potentially strengthening Hafnia’s operational capabilities and market influence.

More about Hafnia

Hafnia Limited is a leading global tanker owner, specializing in the transportation of oil, oil products, and chemicals for major national and international oil, chemical, trading, and utility companies. The company operates around 200 vessels and offers a fully integrated shipping platform with services including technical management, commercial and chartering services, pool management, and large-scale bunker procurement. Hafnia is part of the BW Group, an international shipping group with a long history in oil and gas transportation and related industries.

YTD Price Performance: -23.87%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Inditex reported strong financial performance for the fiscal year 2024, with sales growing by 7.5% to 38,632 million euros and net profit increasing by 9.0% to 5,866 million euros. data.title: Japan Logistics Fund Announces Cash Distribution Policy Amendments
data.description:
An update from Japan Logistics Fund, Inc. ( (JP:8967) ) is now available.

Japan Logistics Fund, Inc. announced a partial amendment to its cash distribution policy, effective April 24, 2025, contingent upon approval at the upcoming General Unitholders’ Meeting. The amendment will allow for distributions in excess of earnings under certain conditions, aiming to stabilize dividends per unit and address the current discount of the investment unit price to the net asset value per unit. Despite the changes, JLF will not make distributions in excess of earnings for the fiscal periods ending July 2025 and January 2026 due to existing reserves, ensuring the amendment does not affect the operating forecast for these periods.

More about Japan Logistics Fund, Inc.

Japan Logistics Fund, Inc. operates as a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) focusing on logistics facilities. It primarily invests in logistics properties, which are characterized by a high ratio of building value to land value and significant depreciation expenses. The company aims to efficiently manage cash and provide returns to its unitholders.

YTD Price Performance: 4.72%

Average Trading Volume: 7

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €1.49B
